content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with strong cross-sector participation: defense (GRSE +9.2%, HAL +1.55%), specialty chemicals (SRF +6.85%, NAVINFLUOR +3.72%), capital goods (TITAGARH +9.84%), financial services (ABCAPITAL +6.61%, CAMS +10.46%, CHOLAHLDNG +3.14%), FMCG (MARICO +4.84%), IT (COFORGE +11.07%). Most existing holdings are in profit on broad post-Q4 earnings re-rating. Focus is on trailing SLs to lock gains rather than new entries — book is already heavily deployed via these holdings, and many are at 52-week highs where pullback risk rises.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24800
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% unrealized. Current SL 1035 is already above entry (locked profit). Trail-gap from CMP 1056.70 to SL 1035 = 2.05%, within the 1% floor and reasonable for a name that ran 30% in a month. HOLD via no-change MODIFY: thesis intact (Q4 PAT +19%, GNPA <1%), letting it run toward target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4%. SL 1735 already above entry (+2.06% locked). Trail-gap CMP-to-SL = 1.26%, above 1% floor. Promoter sold ~2% at ATH — distribution warning — but thesis (Q4 cargo record, FY26 guidance) intact. Holding with breakeven+ SL; not tightening further given the promoter-sale red flag means I want the market to confirm the level rather than chase a tight SL into chop."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4500.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Current SL is at entry (4575). Defense rally strong (GRSE +9.2%, sector at fresh highs). Loosening SL slightly from entry to 4500 to give room — wait, that would loosen which is rejected. Keeping SL at 4575 (breakeven). Trail-gap CMP to 4575 = 1.2%, just above floor. New target 4875 per JM Financial / brokerage TP."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.16%. Current SL 6960 (above entry +0.87% locked). Q4 PAT +124%, EBITDA +80%, CDMO +61% — fundamentals strengthening into the move. Trail-gap CMP-to-SL = 1.26%, above 1% floor. Letting target 7400 (Geojit TP 8500 leaves room) play out."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.86%. SL 828 below entry by 1.2%. Stock up 9.84% today on capital-goods/defense theme. Trail-gap CMP-to-SL = 2.04%. No-change MODIFY (HOLD substitute) — thesis intact, brownfield approval + JSW order. Will trail higher once it clears 860 with confirmation."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = -0.08% (flat). SL 365 = -1.08% from entry, trail-gap 1.0% from CMP. Q4 PAT +30%, AUM +27%, fresh ATH today. No-change MODIFY (HOLD) — let the post-earnings momentum play; will tighten on +2% move."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.31%. Q4 revenue +22%, MOFSL TP 950. SL 815 is below entry by 0.6%, trail-gap from CMP 0.92% — slightly tight but acceptable on a low-vol FMCG name. No-change MODIFY (HOLD)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6% post 11% gap-up. SL 1260 is at breakeven+. Trail-gap CMP-to-SL = 1.50%, above 1% floor. Q4 PAT doubled, Encora deal closed. No-change MODIFY (HOLD) — let it confirm above 1300."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.30%. Up 9.2% today on defense rally. SL 3000 = -0.83% from entry; trail-gap CMP-to-SL = 1.12%, above 1% floor. No-change MODIFY (HOLD). Defense PSU basket rallied sharply, so not tightening into the spike — letting the level confirm."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.16%. Up 10.46% today (note: CMP only +0.16% above entry suggests entry was at intraday highs). Q4 EBITDA at all-time high 46.5% margin, Nuvama TP 910. SL 798 below entry by 0.99%, trail-gap CMP-to-SL = 1.15%. No-change MODIFY (HOLD)."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 400,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.78%. MACD bearish crossover, SMA50 above price, gold on cooling Iran tensions. Position is at small loss with deteriorating technicals (Supertrend SELL, bearish MACD) and the safe-haven catalyst that drove the original thesis is fading per research. Better to redeploy this Rs ~50K to higher-conviction names. Net loss ~Rs 392 — small, controlled exit. Frees Rs 49,648 of capital."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry, trail-gap healthy, thesis intact"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "MACD bearish, safe-haven catalyst fading, redeploy capital"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakeven+ SL with promoter-sale-at-ATH overhang; not chasing tighter"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven, defense theme intact"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 stellar, SL above entry"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "reasoning": "+9.84% session, thesis intact, room to trail higher above 860"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat, post-earnings momentum, tight but acceptable SL"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "FMCG breakout post-Q4, MOFSL TP 950"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakeven+ SL on +11% gap-up day"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "reasoning": "Defense rally; not tightening into spike to avoid noise stop-out"
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 record EBITDA, Nuvama upgrade to 910"
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "SRF (+6.85%, FY26 PAT +47%, Odisha capex) is attractive but extended intraday at +9% — wait for pullback to 2600-2650 zone. BAJAJ-AUTO buyback at ATH but already extended +1.32% at 10,265 against 52-wk high 10,477 — would chase only on dip. CHOLAHLDNG board meeting May 8 = binary event tomorrow, NO new entry per Constraint 11. HDFCBANK still in 12M downtrend, neutral; SBIN Q4 binary tomorrow. AUROPHARMA, NEULANDLAB, GABRIEL — extended single-day moves; want better entries.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavily deployed and broadly profitable on the post-Q4 earnings rally. Cash post-GOLDBEES exit ~Rs 50K plus the deferred HFCL pending order to consider. Cancelling the stale HFCL pending order as 33 hours old with no fill — market has moved on. Cluster check: financial services cluster = PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS + CHOLAHLDNG (not held) — three names, watching for cluster cap. Capital goods/defense cluster = HAL + GRSE + TITAGARH — also three names, at limit. NOT adding fresh names to either cluster today. Priority is risk management on existing winners, not new exposure. Cumulative experiment P&L -53.72% — preservation mode dominates; let winners run with disciplined SLs rather than chase fresh extended breakouts."
}
